src/main/java/h2/orm/H2ORM.java.general_idea: Integrate BackupService to provide database backup and restore capabilities.
src/main/java/h2/orm/H2ORM.java.human_impl: private static final BackupService backupService = new BackupService();

src/main/java/h2/orm/H2ORM.java.general_idea: Integrate ExportService to provide data export capabilities to CSV, Excel, and JSON.
src/main/java/h2/orm/H2ORM.java.human_impl: private static final ExportService exportService = new ExportService();

src/main/java/h2/orm/H2ORM.java.general_idea: Integrate TableManager to provide table creation, deletion, and inspection utilities.
Update import statements to reflect new package structure and added service dependencies.

src/main/java/h2/orm/core/EntityManagerP.general_idea: Remove the ThreadLocal field used to cache EntityManager instances to eliminate stateful thread-bound resources.
src/main/java/h2/orm/core/EntityManagerP.human_impl: Removed `private static final ThreadLocal<EntityManager> entityManagerThreadLocal = new ThreadLocal<>();`

src/main/java/h2/orm/core/EntityManagerP.general_idea: Change EntityManager retrieval to create a new instance per call instead of reusing a thread-local cached instance.
src/main/java/h2/orm/core/EntityManagerP.human_impl: Replaced `getEntityManager` logic to directly call `factory.createEntityManager()` without checking or setting ThreadLocal.

src/main/java/h2/orm/core/EntityManagerP.general_idea: Convert the closeEntityManager method into a no-op with a debug log, as lifecycle is now managed per-transaction.
src/main/java/h2/orm/core/EntityManagerP.human_impl: Replaced closing logic in `closeEntityManager` with `logger.debug(...)` and comments indicating deprecation.

src/main/java/h2/orm/core/EntityManagerP.general_idea: Inline the EntityManager creation and transaction management within executeInTransaction to ensure isolation.
src/main/java/h2/orm/core/EntityManagerP.human_impl: Modified `executeInTransaction` to create `em` locally via `factory.createEntityManager()` and manage its lifecycle in try/finally.

src/main/java/h2/orm/core/MetadataManage.general_idea: Added a generic helper method to retrieve entity IDs via reflection to support new pagination and sorting features.
Renamed the existing isEntityNew method to isEntityNewById to distinguish it from the new logic or prepare for refactoring.

src/main/java/h2/orm/core/TransactionMan.general_idea: Removed the finally block from the isActive method to prevent closing the EntityManager while the transaction state is being checked.
Added exception handling to the commit method to log errors, rollback the transaction if active, and rethrow the exception.
src/main/java/h2/orm/core/TransactionMan.human_impl: Added catch block after commit logic: logs error, checks isActive(), rolls back, and throws e.

src/main/java/h2/orm/core/TransactionMan.general_idea: Added exception handling to the rollback method to log errors and rethrow the exception.
src/main/java/h2/orm/core/TransactionMan.human_impl: Added catch block after rollback logic: logs error and throws e.

src/main/java/h2/orm/example/SpringBootS.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect the new package structure of the JpaRepository class.

src/main/java/h2/orm/example/SuperSimple.general_idea: Update import statement to reflect a package restructuring of the JpaRepository class.

pom.xml.general_idea: Change the Maven compiler source and target from JDK 24 to JDK 21 to align with the migration goal.
Introduce the 'release' compiler argument to ensure cross-compilation compatibility for JDK 21.
Enable the '-parameters' compiler flag to preserve parameter names in bytecode, often required for modern frameworks.
Enable comprehensive compiler warnings with '-Xlint:all' while suppressing processing warnings.
Configure the Maven Surefire plugin to run unit tests with specific include/exclude patterns and logging configuration.
Configure the Maven Failsafe plugin to run integration tests during the verify phase.
Add the JaCoCo plugin to generate code coverage reports during the test phase.
Add the SpotBugs plugin for static code analysis with maximum effort and low threshold.
Add the GPG plugin to sign artifacts during the release profile execution.
Define Maven profiles for release, development, and fast builds to manage test skipping and signing.
Configure distribution management URLs for deploying snapshots and releases to OSSRH.
Update project name, description, version, and developer information to reflect the new state of the library.
Update SCM connection details and issue management URLs to point to the correct GitHub repository.
Extract plugin versions into properties for better maintainability and consistency.
Remove the Maven Shade plugin which was previously used for creating uber JARs.
Simplify the Maven Assembly plugin configuration to produce a complete JAR with dependencies without manifest classpath manipulation.
Enhance the Maven Javadoc plugin configuration with explicit source/target, encoding, and doclint options.

.idea/copilotDiffState.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from 17 to 21 to align with the new JDK version.
Add maven.compiler.release property to ensure cross-compilation compatibility with JDK 21.
Add compiler arguments for parameter name retention and linting in the maven-compiler-plugin configuration.
Add maven-failsafe-plugin to support integration testing execution.
Add jacoco-maven-plugin for code coverage reporting.
Add spotbugs-maven-plugin for static code analysis.
Add maven-gpg-plugin for signing artifacts in the release profile.
Define dev, fast, and release build profiles to manage test skipping and signing.
Configure distribution management for deploying to OSSRH (Sonatype).
Update project metadata including inception year, developer details, and SCM information.
Refine SCM connection strings and add tag configuration.
Add issue management configuration pointing to GitHub Issues.
Enhance maven-javadoc-plugin configuration with explicit source/target and additional options.
Configure maven-surefire-plugin with specific include/exclude patterns and system properties.
Refine maven-assembly-plugin configuration to set final name and disable assembly ID appending.

src/main/resources/logback.xml.general_idea: Enhance console log pattern to include the full date for better traceability.
Rename log files from 'jpa-database-handler' to 'h2-orm' to reflect the specific technology stack.
